Fields.Name: Disable Param - Network Test
Fields.Description: Parameters marked with  are excluded in the NT version package.

Fields.Name: Contact Land on Death - SE ID
Fields.Description: SEID pronounced when contacting the ground after death. (-1: Invalid). SEID category is fixed to c

Fields.Name: Contact Land on Death - Additional SE ID
Fields.Description: Additional SEID (for material) that sounds when it comes into contact with the ground after death. (-1: Invalid). SEID category is fixed to c

Fields.Name: Contact Land on Death - Play Count
Fields.Description: Number of pronunciations when touching the ground after death

Fields.Name: Enable Play Count per Rigid Body Unit
Fields.Description: Do you count the number of pronunciations of surface contact after death in rigid body units? (: Rigid body unit, : Character unit)

Fields.Name: Contact Land on Death - Min Impulse
Fields.Description: Minimum impulse value required for ground contact determination after death

Fields.Name: Contact Land on Death - Min Speed
Fields.Description: Minimum speed value required for ground contact determination after death

Fields.Name: Contact Player on Death - SE ID
Fields.Description: SEID that sounds when you come into contact with Player after death. (-1: Invalid). SEID category is fixed to c

Fields.Name: Contact Player on Death - Min Impulse
Fields.Description: Minimum impulse value required for Player contact judgment after death

Fields.Name: Contact Player on Death - Min Speed
Fields.Description: Minimum speed value required for Player contact judgment after death

Fields.Name: Contact Check Rigid Index [0]
Fields.Description: Specify the INDEX of the rigid body for contact judgment. Specify only the rigid body to which you want to attach SE
